synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2025-20961 Moderate: Oracle Linux 9 xorg-x11-server security update
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2025-20961

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-20961.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
xorg-x11-server-Xdmx-1.20.11-32.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
xorg-x11-server-Xephyr-1.20.11-32.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

xorg-x11-server-Xorg-1.20.11-32.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
xorg-x11-server-Xvfb-1.20.11-32.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
xorg-x11-server-common-1.20.11-32.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
xorg-x11-server-devel-1.20.11-32.el9_7.i686.rpm
xorg-x11-server-devel-1.20.11-32.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
xorg-x11-server-source-1.20.11-32.el9_7.noarch.rpm

aarch64:
xorg-x11-server-Xdmx-1.20.11-32.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
xorg-x11-server-Xephyr-1.20.11-32.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
xorg-x11-server-Xnest-1.20.11-32.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
xorg-x11-server-Xorg-1.20.11-32.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
xorg-x11-server-Xvfb-1.20.11-32.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
xorg-x11-server-common-1.20.11-32.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
xorg-x11-server-devel-1.20.11-32.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
xorg-x11-server-source-1.20.11-32.el9_7.noarch.rpm

http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/xorg-x11-server-1.20.11-32.el9_7.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-62229
CVE-2025-62230
CVE-2025-62231




Description of changes:

[1.20.11-32]
- CVE fix for: CVE-2025-62229 (RHEL-119960), CVE-2025-62230 (RHEL-120033),
